lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.
The car is in good condition. The exterior has minor cosmetic wear, and the interior is clean and well-maintained. The vehicle is mechanically reliable and requires no immediate repairs.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been reliably maintained. The exterior paint retains a nice shine, though there are a few minor cosmetic blemishes consistent with regular use. Inside, the interior is clean and well-preserved, with all features functioning correctly. Mechanically, the car is solid, providing a smooth ride and dependable performance. It’s a well-rounded vehicle that is ready for its next owner without needing any immediate repairs.

Step into a ride you can count on! This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained to ensure a smooth and reliable driving experience. While it shows some light, expected wear from its time on the road, its performance remains excellent and it's ready for many more miles. It’s a fantastic choice for anyone looking for quality and dependability at a great value!
This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor surface scratches, and the interior shows light wear from normal use. All mechanical systems are in good working order.

This vehicle is in good, reliable condition and has been well-maintained throughout its life. The exterior presents very well, though upon close inspection, there are a few minor stone chips on the front bumper and some light surface scratches typical of a car that has been driven regularly. The interior is clean and comfortable, showing only minor creasing on the leather seats and slight wear on the steering wheel. Mechanically, the car is in excellent working order with a consistent service record and no pending repairs. It offers a solid, dependable driving experience for anyone looking for a well-kept vehicle.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of luxury and mechanical integrity. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, the unit demonstrates consistent performance and aesthetic preservation. We invite you to experience the refined handling and sophisticated interior of this high-caliber automobile, now available for immediate acquisition.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my reliable daily driver, and she’s looking for a new home! This car has been so good to me—it's in really solid shape and runs like a dream. It’s perfect for someone who wants a dependable ride that still looks great on the road. I’ve taken good care of it, and I’m sure you’ll love it as much as I have. Come take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, optimized by individual throttle bodies and a high-pressure VANOS system. Power is delivered through a precise Getrag 6-speed manual transmission to a limited-slip differential. The chassis is sorted with rear subframe reinforcement and refreshed bushings, ensuring the MacPherson strut front and multi-link rear suspension maintain peak mechanical grip. A well-maintained example of BMW’s high-revving engineering excellence.
Used car. Good condition. Mechanicals sound. Body clean. Clean title.

This vehicle is a well-maintained example of its class, offering a perfect balance of performance and long-term reliability. The exterior retains a strong, glossy finish, with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful road use. Inside, the cabin is clean and inviting; the seats show minimal wear, and all electronic features—from the infotainment system to the climate control—operate flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly, backed by a consistent maintenance history and recent preventative service. It drives straight, brakes firmly, and shifts seamlessly, providing a confident and comfortable experience on both city streets and highways. This car has been smoke-free and garage-kept, ensuring it remains in dependable shape for its next owner. Complete service records are available for peace of mind.

This vehicle represents a distinguished balance of performance and value. Meticulously maintained to ensure mechanical reliability and aesthetic integrity, it offers a refined driving experience for the discerning owner. Every component has been thoroughly inspected to meet our rigorous standards for quality and longevity.

We are pleased to present this distinguished vehicle, which has been meticulously maintained to ensure both mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Featuring a robust powertrain and a refined interior, this model offers a superior driving experience for the discerning owner. Its history of diligent servicing guarantees long-term reliability, making it a premier selection for those who demand quality and value in a pre-owned executive transport.

Hey there! I’m looking to find a new home for my awesome car! It’s been such a reliable ride for me and is still in really solid shape, perfect for someone who wants a dependable vehicle without the brand-new price tag. It’s been well-cared for and is ready to hit the road for many more adventures. I'm super easy to chat with, so shoot me a message if you want to come take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 is powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six engine, featuring individual throttle bodies and a recently serviced VANOS system. Power is routed through a precise Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox to a limited-slip rear differential. The chassis integrity is ensured with documented rear subframe reinforcement, and the suspension retains its communicative feedback via refreshed bushings and Bilstein dampers. While the exterior displays minor stone chips and age-appropriate patina, the mechanical components are robust, offering the signature linear power delivery and telepathic steering rack response enthusiasts demand. A well-maintained example of BMW’s finest naturally aspirated engineering.
Used car. Good condition. Clean title. Regular maintenance performed. Runs well.

This vehicle strikes the perfect balance between reliability and value, maintained with a high level of care that shows in every detail. The exterior presents beautifully, retaining its original luster with only minor, age-appropriate character marks. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean, smoke-free, and well-preserved, featuring fully functional electronics and comfortable upholstery. Mechanically, the car is sound; it has benefited from consistent oil changes, a recent brake inspection, and a set of tires with significant tread remaining. It delivers a smooth, confident driving experience, making it an ideal choice for someone seeking a dependable, high-quality vehicle that is ready for the road today.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier selection for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers an exceptional balance of performance and long-term value. Every system has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our exacting standards for roadworthiness and comfort.

This distinguished vehicle represents a premier selection for the discerning driver, characterized by its consistent maintenance history and robust mechanical integrity. The exterior maintains a commendable presence, while the cabin offers a refined environment that speaks to its careful ownership. Engineered for sustained performance and reliability, this model provides a sophisticated driving experience that justifies its standing as a superior value in today's market.

Hey there! I'm selling my reliable ride that's been so good to me over the years. It's in really solid shape and runs like a dream—perfect for daily commutes or fun weekend getaways! It has been well-maintained and is totally ready for its next adventure. Come take it for a spin, I just know you're going to love how it handles!

Available is a mechanically sound E92 M3 featuring the legendary S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8. This unit has undergone proactive maintenance, including rod bearing replacement and updated throttle actuators, ensuring the high-revving valvetrain remains reliable up to its 8,400 RPM redline. The M-DCT dual-clutch transmission delivers crisp, rapid-fire shifts, while the variable M-differential provides exceptional longitudinal traction. Equipped with Electronic Damper Control (EDC), the chassis maintains precise damping characteristics across all drive modes. While showing minor cosmetic wear consistent with its age, the powertrain and subframe remain robust, offering a pure, visceral driving experience.
Reliable vehicle. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean interior. Firm price.

This vehicle represents a fantastic opportunity for a driver seeking a reliable, well-maintained car that balances luxury with everyday utility. The exterior maintains a deep, reflective shine, showing only the minor, superficial wear one would expect from careful commuting. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean; the leather seats are supple and free of any significant wear or cracking, and the dashboard remains pristine with all buttons and switches functioning perfectly. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and quietly, benefiting from a rigorous maintenance schedule and a very recent comprehensive service including fluid flushes and a multi-point inspection. The tires have ample tread remaining, and the suspension provides a firm yet comfortable ride, free of any unusual noises. Whether you are looking for a dependable family car or a sophisticated daily driver, this vehicle is mechanically sound, cosmetically appealing, and ready for the road today.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies reliable performance and sophisticated engineering. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Offering a balanced synthesis of durability and comfort, this vehicle represents a premier acquisition for the discerning driver who values both substance and value.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a distinguished balance of performance and long-term reliability. Featuring a well-preserved interior and a documented service history, it offers a refined driving experience for the discerning professional. An exceptional opportunity to acquire a high-caliber automobile that upholds rigorous standards of mechanical integrity.

Hey there! I’m selling my trusty ride and it’s been such a fantastic car for me. It’s in really wonderful shape and has been super reliable for all my daily errands and road trips. I’ve made sure to keep up with the maintenance, so it’s ready to hit the road with a new owner today! It’s a smooth drive and honestly just a great all-around vehicle. I’d love for it to go to a good home, so feel free to reach out if you have any questions!

Offering a mechanically sound E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54 inline-six power plant with individual throttle bodies. This example boasts a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox and a factory-calibrated variable M differential lock. Critical maintenance has been prioritized, including a comprehensive VANOS system overhaul and proactive rear subframe reinforcement to ensure structural integrity. While the exterior displays minor stone chips consistent with road use, the chassis remains taut with refreshed bushings, and the atmospheric induction provides an unfiltered acoustic profile. A driver-focused machine that balances daily usability with track-ready performance.
Used car in good condition. Well-maintained. Runs smoothly. Clean title. Ready for sale.

Experience a blend of reliability and sophistication with this meticulously cared-for vehicle. The exterior boasts a deep, consistent shine, showing only the light, expected character of a well-loved car. Inside, you'll find a pristine, non-smoking cabin where the upholstery remains firm and the climate control and infotainment systems work flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs smooth and quiet, backed by a consistent maintenance record and a recent professional inspection. Whether navigating city streets or cruising the highway, the handling is precise and the braking is responsive. This is a complete package for a buyer seeking a dependable, high-quality ride that has been treated with genuine respect.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This specimen has undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and reliability. Offering a harmonious balance of luxury and utility, this vehicle represents a premier acquisition for the discerning driver who values consistent quality and proven longevity.
